some figs. of ADX and DDX are given
with 14 MeV neutron source. Numerical tables and
1.5 nsec pulsed neutrons were generated by
deuteron beam bunched in 4 MHz Klystron buncher.
Energy resolution was 2.3% at 14 MeV in FWHM.
Ring geometry. The ring size of scattering sample was
10 cm in outer radius and 8 cm in inner radius. The
cross section of sample was 2 x 2 cm or 2 cm in
Neutron flight path length was 9.5 m.
NE-213 liquid scintillator 12.7 cm in diameter
and 5.08 cm in length. Source neutron flux monitored
cm dia. and 5.08 cm length, was set at 90 degrees
Not corrected for multiple scattering, correction
estimated to be small, except in secondary energy
.Large discrepancies with ENDF/B-IV data were found,
particularly in the range from 5 to 13 MeV.
